Hub Home > Email & Communication > Cold Outreach Email Sequence

Cold Outreach Email Sequence

Write a complete cold outreach sequence — initial email plus 3 follow-ups — personalized to your target buyer. Includes subject lines, body copy, CTAs, and timing between sends. Designed for B2B service businesses, agencies, and consultants.

Intermediate ADD YOUR EXAMPLES Revenue-driving
Pro tip

Include a real example of a past client win with specific numbers. One concrete result beats ten paragraphs of promises.

cold email outreach sales B2B prospecting follow-up email sequence

How to use this prompt

  1. Pick your AI model. Choose the tab for Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini or Copilot — each variant is tuned for that model.
  2. Copy the full prompt. Click Copy Full Prompt to copy the text to your clipboard.
  3. Paste into your AI tool. Open your chosen model and paste the prompt into a new chat.
  4. Replace the [placeholders]. Swap any bracketed fields for your company name, audience, product or tone.
  5. Run and refine. Review the output. If anything is off, ask the AI to tighten tone, length or format.

Prompt Variants by Model

Claude Claude 4.x
FRESH APR 2026 
You are a B2B sales copywriter who writes cold emails that get replies, not spam complaints.

<outreach_context>
What I sell: [YOUR SERVICE/PRODUCT]
Target buyer: [TITLE, COMPANY SIZE,...
You are a B2B sales copywriter who writes cold emails that get replies, not spam complaints.

<outreach_context>
What I sell: [YOUR SERVICE/PRODUCT]
Target buyer: [TITLE, COMPANY SIZE,...

Unlock this prompt + all 92 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 92 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

You are a B2B sales copywriter who writes cold emails that get replies, not spam complaints.

<outreach_context>
What I sell: [YOUR SERVICE/PRODUCT]
Target buyer: [TITLE, COMPANY SIZE, INDUSTRY]
Problem I solve: [THE PAIN POINT — be specific]
Best client result: [ONE concrete outcome with numbers — e.g., "Helped a 12-person agency cut invoice processing from 8 hours to 45 minutes per week"]
My differentiator: [WHY ME over competitors]
Desired CTA: [book a call / reply / visit a page / try a demo]
Tone: [professional / casual-professional / direct / warm]
</outreach_context>

Write a 4-email cold outreach sequence:

**Email 1 — The opener** (Day 0)
- Subject line (3 options — under 6 words each)
- Body: under 100 words. Lead with their pain, not your pitch. End with a low-friction CTA.

**Email 2 — The value add** (Day 3)
- Subject line (re: thread or fresh — your call)
- Body: share a useful insight, framework, or data point relevant to their problem. Subtle positioning, no hard sell.

**Email 3 — The proof** (Day 7)
- Subject line
- Body: the client result story. Specific numbers, relatable situation, clear outcome.

**Email 4 — The breakup** (Day 14)
- Subject line
- Body: acknowledge the silence, restate value in one sentence, leave the door open. Under 50 words.

Rules:
- No "I hope this finds you well"
- No "I wanted to reach out"
- No walls of text
- Every email earns the next open
Notes: Claude writes tight, non-generic outreach. The XML context ensures personalization. For bulk campaigns, ask Claude to create 5 variations of Email 1 for A/B testing subject lines.
ChatGPT GPT-5
FRESH APR 2026 
Act as a B2B sales copywriter who writes cold emails that generate replies. You hate generic outreach and never write "I hope this finds you...
Act as a B2B sales copywriter who writes cold emails that generate replies. You hate generic outreach and never write "I hope this finds you...

Unlock this prompt + all 92 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 92 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Act as a B2B sales copywriter who writes cold emails that generate replies. You hate generic outreach and never write "I hope this finds you well."

Write a 4-email cold sequence for me.

What I sell: [SERVICE/PRODUCT]
Target buyer: [TITLE, COMPANY SIZE, INDUSTRY]
Problem I solve: [SPECIFIC PAIN]
Best result: [CLIENT WIN with numbers]
Differentiator: [WHY ME]
CTA: [book call / reply / visit / demo]
Tone: [professional / casual / direct / warm]

Sequence:
Email 1 (Day 0): The opener — 3 subject lines, under 100 words, pain-first, low-friction CTA
Email 2 (Day 3): Value add — useful insight, no hard sell
Email 3 (Day 7): Proof — client story with numbers
Email 4 (Day 14): Breakup — under 50 words, door open

No fluff. Every email earns the next open.
Notes: Ask ChatGPT to personalize the sequence for a specific company: "Now rewrite Email 1 for [Company Name] — their CEO just posted about [topic] on LinkedIn." This creates hyper-relevant openers.

Write a cold outreach email sequence for my business.

**What I sell:** [SERVICE/PRODUCT]
**Target buyer:** [TITLE, COMPANY SIZE,...

Your email unlocks all 92 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Write a cold outreach email sequence for my business.

**What I sell:** [SERVICE/PRODUCT]
**Target buyer:** [TITLE, COMPANY SIZE, INDUSTRY]
**Problem I solve:** [PAIN POINT]
**Best result:** [CLIENT WIN with numbers]
**Differentiator:** [WHY ME]
**CTA:** [book call / reply / visit / demo]
**Tone:** [professional / casual / direct / warm]

Research current best practices for cold email (deliverability, open rates, reply rates), then write:

Email 1 (Day 0): Opener — 3 subject lines, under 100 words, pain-first
Email 2 (Day 3): Value add — insight, no hard sell
Email 3 (Day 7): Proof — client story with numbers
Email 4 (Day 14): Breakup — under 50 words

No generic openers. No fluff.
Notes: Gemini can research your target buyer's company and recent news to personalize the opener. Ask: "Research [Company] and customize Email 1 based on what you find about their current challenges."

Target buyer:...

Target buyer:...

Your email unlocks all 92 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Write a 4-email cold outreach sequence.

What I sell: [SERVICE/PRODUCT]
Target buyer: [TITLE, SIZE, INDUSTRY]
Problem: [PAIN POINT]
Best result: [CLIENT WIN with numbers]
Differentiator: [WHY ME]
CTA: [action]
Tone: [style]

Email 1 (Day 0): Opener — 3 subject lines, under 100 words, pain-first
Email 2 (Day 3): Value add, no hard sell
Email 3 (Day 7): Client proof with numbers
Email 4 (Day 14): Breakup, under 50 words

No "hope this finds you well." No fluff.
Notes: Copilot can draft each email directly in Outlook with scheduling. Ask it to set up the sequence with delayed send dates so you can review all four and schedule them in one session.

Frequently Asked Questions

What does the Cold Outreach Email Sequence prompt do?

Write a complete cold outreach sequence — initial email plus 3 follow-ups — personalized to your target buyer. Includes subject lines, body copy, CTAs, and timing between sends. Designed for B2B service businesses, agencies, and consultants.

Which AI models is this prompt tested on?

This prompt is field-tested on Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini and Copilot. Each model has its own optimized variant above.

Do I need a paid AI account to use this prompt?

No. This prompt is written to run on the free tier of Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini and Copilot. Paid tiers simply give you longer context windows and faster responses.

Can I customize this prompt for my business?

Yes. Any text inside square brackets is a placeholder you replace with your own business details, such as company name, audience, product or tone. You can also ask the AI to adjust format, length or style after the first output.

When was this prompt last verified?

Each model variant above shows its own freshness stamp. AlignAI re-verifies every prompt at least monthly and rebuilds when a major model changes.
